// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

[Flags]
internal enum SignedFlagsFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class SignedFlags
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 4;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = true;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "Combo",
                "Negative",
                "None",
                "One"
            };

        public static global::SignedFlags[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new global::SignedFlags[] {
                global::SignedFlags.Negative,
                global::SignedFlags.Combo,
                global::SignedFlags.None,
                global::SignedFlags.One
            };

        public static Int64[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int64[] {
                -2L,
                -1L,
                0L,
                1L
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out global::SignedFlags result, SignedFlagsFormat format = SignedFlagsFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & SignedFlagsFormat.Name) == SignedFlagsFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("None", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.None;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("One", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Negative", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Negative;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Combo", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Combo;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SignedFlagsFormat.Value) == SignedFlagsFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.None;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("-2", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Negative;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("-1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Combo;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out global::SignedFlags result, SignedFlagsFormat format = SignedFlagsFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & SignedFlagsFormat.Name) == SignedFlagsFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("None", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.None;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("One", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Negative", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Negative;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Combo", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Combo;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SignedFlagsFormat.Value) == SignedFlagsFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.None;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("-2", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Negative;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("-1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SignedFlags.Combo;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static global::SignedFlags Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, SignedFlagsFormat format = SignedFlagsFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::SignedFlags result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static global::SignedFlags Parse(string value, SignedFlagsFormat format = SignedFlagsFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::SignedFlags result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(global::SignedFlags input)
        {
            return unchecked(((Int64)18446744073709551615UL & (Int64)input) == (Int64)input);
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static global::SignedFlags[]? _values;
        private static Int64[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

internal static partial class SignedFlagsExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this global::SignedFlags value) => value switch
    {
        global::SignedFlags.None => "None",
        global::SignedFlags.One => "One",
        global::SignedFlags.Negative => "Negative",
        global::SignedFlags.Combo => "Combo",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this global::SignedFlags value, out Int64 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::SignedFlags.None:
                underlyingValue = 0L;
                return true;
            case global::SignedFlags.One:
                underlyingValue = 1L;
                return true;
            case global::SignedFlags.Negative:
                underlyingValue = -2L;
                return true;
            case global::SignedFlags.Combo:
                underlyingValue = -1L;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int64 GetUnderlyingValue(this global::SignedFlags value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int64 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }

    public static bool IsFlagSet(this global::SignedFlags value, global::SignedFlags flag) => ((Int64)value & (Int64)flag) == (Int64)flag;
}
